title: edhoc.rs: VecExt trait added but not pub - limits reuse
description:
The VecExt helper trait (push_err/extend_err) was added to edhoc.rs as a private trait. This pattern could be useful elsewhere in the codebase for consistent heapless::Vec error handling. Consider moving to a common module or making it pub(crate).

File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs lines 74-91
close_reason: Design suggestion - VecExt as private trait is acceptable; reuse deferred to future work
